violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Large open air case was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All items requiring refrigeration were relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The large open air case area was not in good repair, with an ambient temperature of 48. PIC stated that technician is scheduled today to recalibrate the unit. All items requiring refrigeration were moved to other units. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
